confidence.label: medium
confidence.basis: Candidate evidence exists, but the edit has not been applied or behavior-validated.

derived_from.inherited_boundary: candidate evidence only; not local validation of the proposed edit

proposed_change.summary: One conceptual skill or router improvement.
proposed_change.patch_hint: Short human-readable patch hint, not a broad rewrite.

regression_tasks: GitHub or currentness task routes to external research
governance or routing update remains a framework-governance change
expected_improvement: What improves if the candidate is later applied.
rollback: How to abandon this candidate without mutating the target file.
